# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that runs directly on the master node for faster execution. The pipeline performs builds, runs tests, and deploys to production. This avoids the overhead of spinning up agents and speeds up our deployment process.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent {
        label 'master'
    }
    options {
        // Disables concurrent builds for the same job, useful when running directly on master
        disableConcurrentBuilds()
        // Adds a timestamp to all console output
        timestamps()
    }
    stages {
        stage('Checkout SCM') {
            steps {
                script {
                    // Assuming your SCM is configured in the job or using a shared library
                    // For a simple checkout from a Git repository:
                    checkout scm
                    echo "Source code checked out on the master node."
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Building application on the master node..."
                    // Example: Execute a Maven build command (ensure Maven is installed on master)
                    // sh 'mvn clean install'
                    // Example: Execute a Gradle build command (ensure Gradle is installed on master)
                    // sh 'gradle clean build'
                    // Example: Simple shell command
                    sh 'echo "Simulating build process..."'
                    sh 'mkdir -p build && touch build/app.jar' // Create a dummy artifact
                    echo "Build complete."
                }
            }
            post {
                always {
                    // Archive build artifacts, for example
                    archiveArtifacts artifacts: 'build/*', fingerprint: true
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Test') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Running tests on the master node..."
                    // Example: Execute a Maven test command
                    // sh 'mvn test'
                    // Example: Execute a Gradle test command
                    // sh 'gradle test'
                    // Example: Simple shell command
                    sh 'echo "Simulating tests execution..."'
                    echo "Tests complete. All passed."
                }
            }
            post {
                always {
                    // Publish JUnit test results, for example
                    // junit '**/target/surefire-reports/*.xml'
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Initiating deployment to Production..."
                    // Add a human approval step before deploying to production
                    input message: 'Approve deployment to Production?', ok: 'Deploy'

                    echo "Deploying application to production from master node..."
                    // Example: Execute a deployment script
                    // sh './deploy-to-prod.sh build/app.jar'
                    // Example: Copy artifact to a remote server (requires sshpass or ssh keys configured)
                    // sh 'scp build/app.jar user@prod-server:/opt/app/'
                    sh 'echo "Simulating production deployment of build/app.jar..."'
                    echo "Deployment to Production complete."
                }
            }
        }
    }
    post {
        always {
            echo "Pipeline finished."
        }
        success {
            echo "Pipeline succeeded!"
        }
        failure {
            echo "Pipeline failed!"
        }
        unstable {
            echo "Pipeline finished with unstable results."
        }
    }
}
